W/S throttle · I/K pitch (I also cranks the starter when ignition is armed) · Shift+I hold = prime carb (cold engine) · A/D roll · Q/E yaw · G gear · F flaps · \ canopy · B brakes (ground) / binoculars (ext cam) · Shift+B parking brake · Z reverse thrust (ground) · C camera · V quick-look (cockpit) · Shift+V ILS lock · H autopilot · [/] heading bug · M waypoint AP · Shift+click mini-map = chain route · Shift+M clear route / reset trip timer · ;/' trim (Shift+' = fine nose-up) · Shift+,/Shift+. baro · X kill engine · L landing light · N wipers · U pitot heat · Shift+; cockpit night mode · Shift+C carb heat · -/= mixture lean/rich · Shift+F cowl flaps · T +1h · Shift+T test chimes (ground) / time keypad (air) · Shift+A ATIS · Shift+E emergency site · J jump airport · K squawk · Shift+K pre-flight checklist (ground) · Shift+N approach plate · Y ribbon · ~ airshow smoke · O catapult (carrier deck) · P photo · Shift+P bailout · , settings · Esc pause · R reset

SETTINGS

SENSITIVITY1.00×
Pitch / roll / yaw response. Higher = twitchier stick.
FIELD OF VIEW70°
Camera lens. Wider feels faster; narrower zooms in.
AUDIO VOLUME100%
Master volume (stall horn, future engine sound).
LIVERYCLASSIC
Paint scheme for your plane. Saved between flights.
ENGINESSINGLE
Single nose prop or two wing-mounted props. Pure visual + audio flavor — same flight model either way.
RAINOFF
Streaks across the screen and a moodier, dimmer sky.
FOGOFF
Visibility haze — LIGHT cuts to ~3 km, HEAVY to ~1 km. Real IFR scan on the ILS + glideslope.
WIPERSAUTO
Cockpit windshield wipers. N cycles OFF/SLOW/FAST in flight. AUTO runs them while rain is on.
COWL FLAPSCLOSED
Engine cooling louvers. Open drops CHT ~25°C under load (helps on long climbs) but adds ~4% drag in cruise. Shift+F toggles in flight.
VOICERADIO
Pilot/ATC voice callouts on the radio. RADIO = important calls only (clearance, gear, wind shear, terrain, fuel, ATIS, bird strike). FULL = every line on the strip. OFF = silent strip like before.
COLD STARTON
Start each flight with engine off; press I on the ground to crank it over. Off = wheels-warm and ready to roll.
SMOKE TRAIL COLORLIVERY
Ribbon (Y) and airshow smoke (~) color. LIVERY follows your paint scheme.
TUTORIALSEEN
Re-arm the welcome card so it pops above the menu on your next page load.
REPLAY · LAST 30sclick or press R to skip
▶ PLAY ←→ nudge ·1s · Space play/pause · R skip 0.0 / 0.0s

RANKCADET
ThrottleW up / S down PitchI nose up / K nose down RollA / D Yaw (rudder)Q / E Gear up/downG Flaps cycleF Brakes (ground)B Parking brake (ground)Shift+B Reverse thrust (ground)Z Camera cycleC Kill engine (deadstick)X Ignition crank (cold start / restart)I Time skip (+1h)T · Shift+T = -1h Pause menuEsc Quick-jump airportJ, 1–9 · Shift+digit = other end ResetR
Throttle to ~80%, hold I at ~140 km/h to rotate. Retract gear with G. Three airfields scattered across mountains, lakes & coast. To land: lower gear, deploy flaps, fly the PAPI — red=low, white=high, 2&2=on slope. Watch the WIND readout — a stiff crosswind on final means you’ll need rudder (Q/E) to crab the nose into the breeze.
CLICK or press SPACE to fly

WELCOME, PILOT

Quick rundown before your first sortie

FLY THE PLANE

ThrottleW / S
PitchI / K
RollA / D
Yaw (rudder)Q / E

USE THE COCKPIT

Camera cycleC
Autopilot holdH
Gear up/downG
Flaps cycleF
Brakes (ground)B
Kill engineX
Ignition crankI
Throttle to ~80%, hold I at ~140 km/h to rotate. Press , any time for full settings, Esc for the pause menu. You can re-open this guide later from Settings.
